# quaasx-excel

> AI-powered spreadsheet generation, editing, and statistical analysis platform by Quaasx Computers.

quaasx-excel is a next-generation web application that converts natural language descriptions into fully functional, multi-sheet Excel workbooks with live formulas, interactive charts, and 80+ built-in statistical functions — all computed client-side for complete data privacy.

## Key Capabilities
- AI spreadsheet generation from plain English descriptions
- Upload and edit existing .xlsx files using AI chat
- 80+ statistical functions: t-tests, ANOVA, correlation, regression, Wilcoxon, Mann-Whitney, Chi-Square, and more
- Live in-browser formula engine with recursive computation
- Interactive chart generation: bar, line, pie, area, scatter, heatmap with auto-detection
- Multi-sheet workbook support with tab navigation
- Clinical/medical stats: Sensitivity, Specificity, Odds Ratio, PPV, NPV, BMI, BSA
- Financial analysis: NPV, IRR, CAGR, ROI, PMT, FV, PV, Breakeven, Margin
- Engineering QC: Process Cpk, UCL/LCL, RMSE, MAPE, MAE
- 3 AI modes: Build (direct generation), Plan (step-by-step), Ask (discussion)
- AI reasoning transparency with live cognitive window
- 4 premium UI themes: Obsidian Purple, Cyberpunk Neon, Matrix Green, Arctic Steel
- 100% client-side calculations — no data sent to servers
- Download as .xlsx compatible with Microsoft Excel and Google Sheets

## Pricing
- Free Tier: ₹0 (100,000 token credits)
- Pro Plan: ₹499/month (unlimited tokens, scientific stats, dynamic charting)
- Pro-Plus: ₹999/month (experimental models, priority queue, advanced telemetry)
- Enterprise: Custom pricing (dedicated deployments, compliance, audit logs)

## Links
- Website: https://quaasx-excel.vercel.app
